name: editorial
description: Open-source editorial skills for AI content creation, by Wordful.

plugins.name: dissolve-ai
plugins.description: Strip AI writing patterns from a prose draft. Manual-invocation skill — runs only when the user types /dissolve-ai or asks by name. Strips patterns catalogued across 21 rule categories: inflated significance, promotional framing, hollow connector phrases, emotional projection, formulaic three-item lists, structural repetition, em-dash overuse, superfluous jargon, and related tells. Inserts [NEEDS SPECIFIC: ...] placeholders inline where a passage cannot be safely cut without inventing facts. Add --report flag for a compact diagnostic block alongside the stripped draft.
